needs_state.reason: Handler (m08g_handlers.inc L1100-1149) requires 'curves':[<handle>,...] -- hex handles of pre-existing coplanar closed curve entities that AcDbRegion::createFromCurves clones from (resolveHandle + acdbOpenObject per handle at L1109-1120); a single stateless args object cannot supply a real, already-database-resident curve handle to reference.

Handler (m08g_handlers.inc L1497-1528) requires 'image_path' (non-empty, MISSING_ARG otherwise at L1502) which is set verbatim as the AcDbRasterImageDef source/active filename -- an external backing raster file on disk. A stateless fixture call cannot supply a real, existing image file path grounded in evidence rather than invented.
